response.justification: The candidate lacks direct C++ experience in industrial automation or embedded systems, with most roles centered on web stacks (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) and no demonstrable work with STL, multi-threading, message brokers, IEC 62443, or industrial protocols — critical for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering background with diverse tech exposure
Proven experience in open-source contributions and technical mentoring
Demonstrated ability to build high-performance, event-driven systems
concerns: Minimal to no recent C++ or STL usage in professional context
No evidence of industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) or IoT protocols
Experience is heavily skewed toward web/mobile, not on-prem/cloud industrial platforms
